name: ER-100 optic neuropathy phase 1 trial
summary: Recruiting phase 1 single-dose study of intravitreal ER-100 AAV OSK epigenetic therapy with doxycycline activation in open-angle glaucoma and non-arteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy, focused on safety and tolerability with functional and biomarker secondary outcomes.
population: Adults 40 to 85 years old with open-angle glaucoma or non-arteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy

trial_details.expected_results_window: The June 12, 2026 ClinicalTrials.gov API view lists primary completion as May 2027 and overall study completion as March 2032.
trial_details.horizon_note: This registry is current human translation activity, but it cannot support efficacy or safety conclusions until results are posted or published.
trial_details.why_it_matters: ER-100 is a direct human partial-reprogramming safety entry point and therefore changes the public boundary from no human program to no human outcomes evidence.
